//: Node SEA (Single Executable Application) config for the orchestrator. Consumed by `node --experimental-sea-config` in build-orchestrator.sh. `main` is the esbuild-bundled single CJS file; `output` is the V8 blob injected into a copy of the node binary. disableExperimentalSEAWarning silences the runtime banner; useSnapshot/useCodeCache are left off for portability.
